updates.tweet_text: Profitable trading is boring trading. Its 95% sitting on hands, followed by trading the same setup, managed the same way, with tight risk management, proper size, and doing this same routine year after year. If its exciting, your likely gambling, not trading
updates.notes: Pure motivational/philosophical commentary. No price levels mentioned, no actionable setups, no market structure referenced.

updates.tweet_text: @pathus21 You can't get rid of it, there's still tension with every trade but the process itself should be boring and repetitive
updates.notes: Reply tweet about trading psychology/process; no prices mentioned at all.

updates.tweet_text:
Big start to week in #ES_F. The last week has been all about 7421. Per Saturday post and Friday newsletter, plan was 7368 had to hold (held exact), then 7421 reclaims trigger long. We triggered long 6:05PM & 7472 target hit

Plan: Ride runner. 7492, 7502, 7511 next. 21=support https://t.co/ykj1DPsF2z

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: One way traffic today as we ripped to 7492 which has been the range resistance all last week. Next leg up sees 7530, big magnet, then we head to 7590. Newsletter out shortly with next entries
